name: code-review-change-size
tagline: Sets diff-size thresholds (800 lines, 500 for complex logic) and asks for a staging plan when a review exceeds them.
verdict: Safe, concrete numeric thresholds with no security concerns. The bare description gives no invocation trigger, the requested staging explanation has no defined output shape, and there is no version signal.

highlights.summary: States the topic, not when/for what task type to invoke it (e.g. during PR review).
No format/shape defined for the staging explanation or where it should appear.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere.
